data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of confirming each checklist item with a timestamp. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that timestamps are recorded for all checklist items, only mentioning that a timestamp is recorded when the patient checks off 'watched video'. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as it does not ensure that all items have confirmation with timestamps.
gaps: No evidence that all checklist items have confirmation with timestamps.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for timestamp confirmation for all checklist items
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that verify timestamp confirmation for each checklist item.
